\tzpentry{ID3325}{Stereo Pi Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3325 introduces Stereo Pi Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \pi_{ \text{stereo}}(q_0, q_1, q_2, q_3) = \frac{1}{1 - q_3}(q_0, q_1, q_2) \end{equation}
